attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
EL.ENTITLEMENT_AUDIT_ID          
,EL.LOG_TIMESTAMP                 
,EL.INCIDENT_ID                   
,EL.SERVICE_ORDER_ID              
,EL.SERVICE_ORDER_LINE            
,EL.ENTITLEMENT_RESULT_CODE       
,EL.ENTITLEMENT_RESULT            
,EL.PRIMARY_REASON_CODE           
,EL.PRIMARY_REASON_DESC           
,EL.ENTITLEMENT_KEY_LOOKUP_CODE   
,EL.ENTITLEMENT_KEY               
,EL.ECL_SCORE                     
,EL.CONTRACT_ID                   
,EL.CONTRACT_NUMBER               
,EL.CONTRACT_STATUS               
,EL.CONTRACT_START_DATE           
,EL.CONTRACT_END_DATE             
,EL.SERVICE_LINE_ID               
,EL.SERVICE_LINE_NAME             
,EL.SERVICE_LINE_STATUS           
,EL.SERVICE_LINE_START_DATE       
,EL.SERVICE_LINE_END_DATE         
,EL.INSTALLED_SITE_ID             
,EL.INSTALLED_SITE_NUMBER         
,EL.ITEM_FAMILY_ID                
,EL.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             
,EL.PRODUCT_ID                    
,EL.INSTANCE_ID                   
,EL.SERIAL_NUMBER                 
,EL.SN_REUSE_FLAG                 
,EL.SN_REUSE_COUNT                
,EL.WARRANTY_CONTRACT_ID          
,EL.WARRANTY_SERVICE_LINE_ID      
,EL.WARRANTY_TYPE                 
,EL.WARRANTY_STATUS               
,EL.WARRANTY_START_DATE           
,EL.WARRANTY_END_DATE             
,EL.CONTACT_PARTY_ID              
,EL.VSESSION_USERNAME             
,EL.ACKNOWLEDGEMENT_CCO_ID        
,EL.OAS_APPL_SHORT_NAME           
,EL.SQL_LAST_UPDATE               
,EL.TAC_RANK                      
,EL.RE_ENTITLEMENT_FLAG           
,EL.CP_LINE_id                    
,EL.CP_LINE_STATUS                
,EL.INSTALLED_SITE_CUSTOMER_NAME  
,EL.USER_PROVIDED_SN              
,EL.ENFORCED_KEY                  
,EL.ENFORCED_ECL_SCORE            
,EL.ENFORCED_KEY_LOOKUP_CODE      
,EL.CLAIMED_PID                   
,EL.CLAIMED_PID_NAME              
,EL.REPLACEMENT_PART_ID           
,EL.REQUESTED_PILLAR              
,EL.END_CUSTOMER_SITE_COUNTRY        
,CAST(CAST(EL.EDW_CREATED_DTM AS VARCHAR(19)) AS TIMESTAMP(0))             
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_EB_XXCTS_ENT_AUDIT_LOG EL
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_SS_XXCTS_ENT_AUDIT_LOG_TBL ST
WHERE ST.ENTITLEMENT_AUDIT_ID=EL.ENTITLEMENT_AUDIT_ID)
